headline_seed: The Supreme Court lets the Trump administration end legal protections for Haitians and Syrians - AP News
draft_text: SCOTUS ruled 6-3 Thursday to let the Trump administration end TPS for roughly 350,000 Haitians and 6,000 Syrians. Justice Alito wrote that the statute bars courts from reviewing termination decisions. AP and NBC News confirm the split fell along ideological lines.
